queries.question: What types of dive sites are available at each scuba diving center?
queries.sql: SELECT Dive_Sites.type  from Bookings join Dive_Sites on Bookings.dive_site_id = Dive_Sites.id join Scuba_Diving_Centers on Bookings.scuba_center_id = Scuba_Diving_Centers.id   GROUP BY Bookings.dive_site_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bookings.scuba_center_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Scuba_Diving_Centers)

queries.question: What types of dive sites are available at each scuba diving center?
queries.sql: select scuba_diving_centers.name , dive_sites.type from Bookings join Dive_Sites on Bookings.dive_site_id = Dive_Sites.id join Scuba_Diving_Centers on Bookings.scuba_center_id = Scuba_Diving_Centers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?dive_sites a :Dive_Sites .
  ?bookings p:hasDive_Sites ?dive_sites .
  ?scuba_diving_centers a :Scuba_Diving_Centers .
  ?bookings p:hasScuba_Diving_Centers ?scuba_diving_centers .
  ?scuba_diving_centers p:name ?name .
  ?dive_sites p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: What are the dive sites and types for every scuba diving centre?
queries.sql: SELECT Dive_Sites.site_name, Dive_Sites.type  from Bookings join Dive_Sites on Bookings.dive_site_id = Dive_Sites.id join Scuba_Diving_Centers on Bookings.scuba_center_id = Scuba_Diving_Centers.id   GROUP BY Bookings.dive_site_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bookings.scuba_center_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Scuba_Diving_Centers)

queries.question: What are the dive sites and types for every scuba diving centre?
queries.sql: select scuba_diving_centers.name , dive_sites.site_name , dive_sites.type from Bookings join Dive_Sites on Bookings.dive_site_id = Dive_Sites.id join Scuba_Diving_Centers on Bookings.scuba_center_id = Scuba_Diving_Centers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?site_name ?type WHERE {
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?dive_sites a :Dive_Sites .
  ?bookings p:hasDive_Sites ?dive_sites .
  ?scuba_diving_centers a :Scuba_Diving_Centers .
  ?bookings p:hasScuba_Diving_Centers ?scuba_diving_centers .
  ?scuba_diving_centers p:name ?name .
  ?dive_sites p:site_name ?site_name .
  ?dive_sites p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: What dive sites are common for all scuba diving centers?
queries.sql: SELECT Dive_Sites.site_name  from Bookings join Dive_Sites on Bookings.dive_site_id = Dive_Sites.id join Scuba_Diving_Centers on Bookings.scuba_center_id = Scuba_Diving_Centers.id   GROUP BY Bookings.dive_site_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Bookings.scuba_center_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Scuba_Diving_Centers)

queries.question: For each scuba diving center, what are the corresponding dive sites?
queries.sql: select scuba_diving_centers.name , dive_sites.site_name from Bookings join Dive_Sites on Bookings.dive_site_id = Dive_Sites.id join Scuba_Diving_Centers on Bookings.scuba_center_id = Scuba_Diving_Centers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?site_name WHERE {
  ?bookings a :Bookings .
  ?dive_sites a :Dive_Sites .
  ?bookings p:hasDive_Sites ?dive_sites .
  ?scuba_diving_centers a :Scuba_Diving_Centers .
  ?bookings p:hasScuba_Diving_Centers ?scuba_diving_centers .
  ?scuba_diving_centers p:name ?name .
  ?dive_sites p:site_name ?site_name .
}

What are the dive sites and types for every scuba diving centre?
What dive sites are used by every scuba diving center?
